  • Uses of ClientRequest in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.controller.server with parameters of type ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MatchManager.handleRequest(ClientRequest request, ClientHandler channel)
    Entry point for every incoming client request: dispatches it through the visitor, turning any failure into an ErrorMessage for the caller.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.client.connection

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ServerConnection.send(ClientRequest request)
    Transport-specific delivery of a request to the server.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.client.connection.rmi

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.client.connection.rmi with parameters of type ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RmiServerConnection.send(ClientRequest request)
    Non-blocking send: the request is enqueued on outbound and the caller returns immediately.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.request

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.message.request that implement ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    AbandonRecoveredMatchRequest
    Request a reconnecting player sends when they choose "Leave this match" on the reconnect screen instead of resuming a match that survived a server crash.
    final record 
    AddPlayerToLobbyRequest
    Request to join the lobby of an existing match.
    final record 
    ChooseTotemRequest
    Request sent by a player to pick a totem color during the pre-game totem selection phase.
    final record 
    CreateMatchRequest
    Request to create a new match.
    final record 
    DisconnectPlayerRequest
    Explicit disconnection request from the player.
    final record 
    ListMatchesRequest
    Request for the list of open (not-yet-started) matches.
    final record 
    PickBonusCardRequest
    Player's request to pick a bonus card.
    final record 
    PickCardsRequest
    Request to pick one or more cards from the board.
    final record 
    PingRequest
    Application-level liveness probe sent by the client to the server.
    final record 
    PlaceTotemRequest
    Request to place the totem on an offer tile.
    final record 
    ReconnectRequest
    Request to rejoin a match that survived a server crash.
    final record 
    RemovePlayerFromLobbyRequest
    Request to remove a player from the lobby (voluntary leave).
    final record 
    SetExpectedPlayersRequest
    Request (typically by the host) to set the expected number of players.

    Method
    Description
    void
    RmiServer.submitRequest(ClientRequest request, RmiClientInterface clientView)
     
    void
    RmiServerInterface.submitRequest(ClientRequest request, RmiClientInterface clientView)
    Forwards a request and registers the callback used to deliver replies.
